summary: Completed testing of bug fixes for SEO Automation Platform iteration 4. All backend tests pass (13/13). Frontend UI verified working correctly. Bug fixes confirmed: (1) Markdown → HTML conversion working, (2) Year replacement (2020-2025 → current year) working, (3) Automation endpoints functional, (4) Calendar checkmarks logic correctly implemented.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 (cosmetic only)

passed_tests: convert_markdown_to_html_headers - Headers (##) converted to <h2> tags
convert_markdown_to_html_bold - Bold (**) converted to <strong> tags
convert_markdown_to_html_lists - Lists converted to <ul>/<li> tags
clean_html_content_year_replacement - Years 2020-2025 replaced with current year
clean_html_content_markdown_conversion - Markdown in clean_html_content also converted
clean_html_content_removes_doctype - DOCTYPE/html/head/body tags removed
automation_sites_endpoint - GET /api/automation/sites returns 200 with site list
automation_publication_log_endpoint - GET /api/automation/publication-log returns 200 with published_at field
automation_history_endpoint - GET /api/automation/history returns 200
article_generate_returns_html_not_markdown - Generated articles have HTML tags, no raw markdown
article_content_has_current_year - No year 2024 in generated content
api_accessible - API is accessible and responding
register_and_login - User registration and login work correctly
Frontend - Login page loads and works
Frontend - Dashboard loads with all widgets
Frontend - Automation page loads with tabs
Frontend - 'Setări & Calendar' tab visible and functional
Frontend - 'Jurnal Publicări' tab visible and functional
Frontend - Empty state shown correctly for no published articles
Frontend - Empty state shown for no WordPress sites
Frontend - History button visible
Frontend - Notifications toggle visible

1_markdown_to_html_conversion.details: convert_markdown_to_html() function correctly converts: headers (## → <h2>), bold (** → <strong>), lists (- → <ul><li>). Uses python markdown library with tables and fenced_code extensions.

2_year_replacement_2024_to_2026.details: clean_html_content() replaces years 2020-2025 with current year using regex. Additionally, generate_automated_article prompts explicitly set current_year = 2026 to prevent LLM from generating old years.

3_automation_endpoints.details: GET /api/automation/sites returns site list with automation settings. GET /api/automation/publication-log returns list with published_at field. GET /api/automation/history returns history list.

4_calendar_checkmarks.details: isPublishedOnDate() function in AutomationPage.jsx correctly checks if article was published on specific date by comparing published_at dates. Calendar renders CheckCircle2 icon when wasPublished is true.

5_single_email_notification.details: Email notification is now only sent from generate_automated_article_with_settings() function. Removed duplicate sending from run_site_automation(). Cannot test actual email sending without RESEND_API_KEY configured.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: convert_markdown_to_html() uses regex to detect markdown patterns and python markdown library for conversion - CORRECT
server.py: clean_html_content() calls convert_markdown_to_html() first, then removes DOCTYPE/structural tags, then replaces old years - CORRECT
server.py: generate_automated_article() and generate_automated_article_with_settings() both force current_year = 2026 in prompts - CORRECT
server.py: run_site_automation() no longer sends email directly - email only sent from generate_automated_article_with_settings() - CORRECT
AutomationPage.jsx: isPublishedOnDate() checks article.published_at against date key for calendar checkmarks - CORRECT
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_bug_fixes_v4.py - Created test suite for bug fixes
seed_data_creation: Test user created for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified in iteration 4: (1) Markdown conversion to HTML working via convert_markdown_to_html() function, (2) Year replacement working - years 2020-2025 replaced with current year, (3) All automation endpoints working, (4) Calendar checkmarks logic implemented in isPublishedOnDate(). Note: Email notification deduplication and WordPress publishing cannot be tested without real WordPress credentials. Calendar checkmarks will only show when there are published articles with published_at dates.
notes_on_untested_items: Email notification deduplication - requires RESEND_API_KEY and actual publish flow
WordPress publishing partial failures - requires real WordPress credentials
Calendar checkmarks visibility - requires published articles to verify visual display
